prose: Water frontier-orbital energies and gap — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: built from the provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz` file, a single-point calculation on this fixed geometry. SCF converged in 7 cycles. HOMO = -8.6037183 eV, LUMO = +0.33695037 eV. The HOMO-LUMO gap is **8.9406687 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy). No warnings reported. The exact command was `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp5kmui_nn/live.json`. Output file: `water_dft_frontier_orbitals.json`.
